category_sources: source_facts.description says yazpp is a C++ API for the YAZ toolkit; official Index Data page describes yazpp as an API for Z39.50/SRU/Solr client and server applications using C++.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading says 'YAZ++ AKA yazpp'; official Index Data page describes 'YAZ++' while source_facts.name is yazpp.
docs_sources: Official Index Data yazpp page links HTML and PDF documentation; official GitHub README says docs are in the doc directory and online at Index Data.
repo_sources: Official Index Data yazpp page links to GitHub; official GitHub README identifies indexdata/yazpp as the YAZ++ source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official Index Data page, and official README identify C++ API/library bindings for YAZ, Z39.50, SRU/Solr, and ZOOM.
